diagrams.title: Basic Computer System Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the fundamental components of a computer system and their interconnections
diagrams.purpose: To understand how data flows between components and the role of each unit in a computer system

diagrams.title: CPU Internal Structure
diagrams.description: Internal organization of the Central Processing Unit showing registers, ALU, and Control Unit
elements: Special Purpose Registers (PC, IR, MAR, MDR, ACC)
diagrams.purpose: To visualize how CPU processes instructions and manages data internally

diagrams.title: Instruction Cycle Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of the Fetch-Decode-Execute cycle
diagrams.purpose: To understand the sequence of operations in executing a single machine instruction

diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows different levels of memory from fastest to slowest and smallest to largest
diagrams.purpose: To understand the tradeoff between speed, size, and cost in memory design
